name: Bombora B2B Intent Data API
what_it_does: Bombora Company Surge REST API for B2B buyer intent data and account intelligence platform. Enables AI agents to manage account-level buyer intent signal retrieval across 4,000+ topics, handle Company Surge score automation for prioritizing high-intent accounts, access content consumption data from Bombora's B2B media cooperative, retrieve topic trend and intent velocity tracking for demand forecasting, manage account segment scoring and qualification automation, handle CRM account enrichment with intent signals from Salesforce and HubSpot, access competitive displacement intent tracking for win-back campaigns, retrieve intent-based account prioritization for SDR and BDR workflows, manage programmatic advertising audience activation via intent segments, and integrate intent data with marketing automation, ABM, and sales platforms.
use_cases: Prioritizing accounts by intent signals from sales development agents
Enriching CRM with buyer intent data from marketing automation agents
Activating intent audiences for ABM campaigns from demand generation agents
Forecasting pipeline from intent trend data from revenue operations agents
not_for: Consumer marketing without B2B account-level intent requirements
SMB sales without enterprise account targeting needs
Simple lead scoring without behavioral intent signal data
best_when: A B2B company using Bombora wants AI agents to automate account intent scoring, CRM enrichment with intent signals, ABM campaign audience activation, SDR prioritization, and pipeline forecasting.
avoid_when: PRIVACY RISK: Intent data reflects company-level behavioral signals inferred from content consumption — use for account-level targeting, not individual tracking. Intent signals can generate false positives for competitors doing competitive research. Data use policies restrict sharing intent data with data brokers.

auth.notes: Bombora uses OAuth 2.0 for API authentication. Per-customer account access. No native webhooks — weekly intent data refresh with batch delivery. Integration with Salesforce, HubSpot, Marketo, and LinkedIn. Snowflake data share for enterprise data warehouse integration. REST API with standard pagination.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual intent data subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; topic count and account coverage determine pricing
pricing.notes: New York, New York. Founded 2014. Private ($100M+ funding). B2B intent data market pioneer. 5,000+ B2B publisher cooperative network. 4,000+ business topics tracked. Company Surge scoring methodology. Integration with major CRM and MAP platforms. Competes with TechTarget Priority Engine and G2 Buyer Intent for intent data.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API account; weekly intent data refresh pattern

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY RISK: Account-level intent data only — do not attempt to resolve to individual contact-level for privacy compliance
Weekly data refresh cadence — intent data updates weekly; automation should align to weekly batch pattern, not real-time
Data use restrictions — Bombora contract prohibits sharing intent data with data brokers; verify use case against data use agreement
Snowflake integration preferred — for enterprise data warehouse integration, Bombora Snowflake data share is more efficient than API polling
Topic taxonomy mapping — 4,000+ topics require careful mapping to your product categories; test topic relevance before using in production scoring
Company matching — Bombora uses domain-based company matching; ensure CRM accounts have correct domain data for matching
agent_readiness.security_notes: B2B intent data. SOC2, CCPA, GDPR. OAuth2. US. Company-level intent signal data.

security_score_components.security_notes: B2B intent data. SOC2, CCPA, GDPR. OAuth2. US. Company-level behavioral intent data.
